title: privileges out of range
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
```
create user test identified by "Test-1234" ;
GRANT ALL ON test.* TO 'test'@'%';
show grants for test;
```


### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
Can't log in to dashboard with test user，because the DASHBOARD_CLIENT privilege is not assigned

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
can log in to dashboard with test user.

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)
v7.1.0 ,v6.5.2
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, password VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_users (id, username, password) VALUES (1, 'test_user', 'Test-1234');
GRANT SELECT, INSERT ON test_users TO test;
SELECT username FROM test_users WHERE id = 1;
SELECT grantee, privilege_type FROM information_schema.role_table_grants WHERE table_name = 'test_users' AND grantee = 'test';
key_bug_features: DASHBOARD_CLIENT privilege not assigned to test user
